headline: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink Warned of an AI Power Crunch—New York Just Halted Large Data Centers: CEG, VST, NEE in Focus
summary: New York has officially become the first U.S. state to halt the construction of large data centers, validating recent warnings from BlackRock Inc. CEO Larry Fink about America’s strained power infrastructure and putting major utility stocks like Constellation Energy Corp.,...
